THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: OFF CALENDAR AS UNTIMELY UNDER CCP 1005(B). THE MOTION WAS FILED AND PERSONALLY SERVED ON DECEMBER 12, 2013. MOVING PARTY ONLY PROVIDED 11 COURT DAYS NOTICE. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ALFREDO CHULIM'S MOTION FOR PREJUDGMENT WRIT OF ATTACHMENT.

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Off calendar as untimely under CCP 1005(b). The motion was filed and personally served on December 12, 2013. Moving party only provided 11 court days notice. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185 (302/MJM)
